author: mark
text:
Record per-plugin synced_at on tasks

Plugins doing bidirectional sync need to know when balls last saw
their remote for a given task to resolve conflicts on updated_at
without a side-cache. Add task.synced_at: BTreeMap<plugin_name,
DateTime<Utc>>, bumped after every successful push response and
every sync-report create/update/defer. Failures leave the map
untouched.

Serde(default, skip_serializing_if = empty) keeps the on-disk
format byte-identical for tasks no plugin has touched; the task
extra flatten map preserves forward-compat with older bl.
Documented in the README plugin conflict-resolution section.

Reported by a Jira sync plugin author.
